name: Zip Tablet Pouch Laptop Bag Navy Blue -Brightroom™
description:
Take your electronics with you on the go with this Zip Tablet Pouch from Brightroom™. Designed in a navy blue hue, this rectangular pouch features a large inner pocket that fits laptops and tablets up to 14 inches in size, and it also has one inner sleeve and a mesh pocket to keep your charging cables, IDs and more. This rectangular pouch boasts an elastic pen holder and has a zipper closure, making it a perfect accessory for business trips and beyond.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
